info.name: Same Day Solution — BBPS Partner API
info.description:
Bharat Bill Payment System (BBPS) Partner API — powered by SparkUpTech.

## Authentication
Every authenticated request requires 3 headers:
- `x-api-key` — Your public API key
- `x-signature` — HMAC-SHA256 signature
- `x-timestamp` — Current Unix timestamp (ms)

Signature formula:
```
HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, JSON.stringify(body) + timestamp)
```
For GET requests (no body): `HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, '' + timestamp)`

## Setup
1. Set `api_key` and `api_secret` in Collection Variables
2. Pre-request scripts auto-generate signature
3. All requests are ready to fire

## Security
- IP Whitelisting enforced (contact admin to whitelist your server IP)
- Timestamp tolerance: 5 minutes
- HTTPS required in production
- Permission required: `bbps` or `all`

## Capabilities
- Get categories and billers
- Fetch bill details and pay bills
- Check transaction status
- Register and track complaints

## Financial Operations
Bill Pay requires `retailer_id` — the retailer's partner_id whose wallet will be debited.
Admin assigns retailers to your partner account.

item.name: 🔐 BBPS — Authenticated
item.description:
All requests require `x-api-key`, `x-signature`, and `x-timestamp` headers.

The pre-request script automatically calculates the HMAC signature.

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'pk_live_YOUR_API_KEY_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables');
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret === 'sk_live_YOUR_API_SECRET_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables');
pm.test('Has categories', function() { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.success).to.be.true; pm.expect(j.categories).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Returns list of BBPS biller categories (Electricity, DTH, Credit Card, Water, etc.).

request.description:
Fetch billers for a given category. Optional payment channel filters (INT, AGT).

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `category` | String | ✅ Yes | Category name (e.g. Credit Card, Electricity, DTH) |
| `paymentChannelName1` | String | No | Payment channel 1 (default: INT) |
| `paymentChannelName2` | String | No | Payment channel 2 (default: AGT) |
| `paymentChannelName3` | String | No | Payment channel 3 |

response.name: 200 — Billers

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'pk_live_YOUR_API_KEY_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables');
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret === 'sk_live_YOUR_API_SECRET_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables');

request.description:

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `biller_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Biller ID from billers list |

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'pk_live_YOUR_API_KEY_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables');
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret === 'sk_live_YOUR_API_SECRET_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables');

request.description:
Fetch bill details for a consumer. Use `input_params` from Biller Info response.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `biller_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Biller ID |
| `consumer_number` | String | Conditional | Required if `input_params` not provided |
| `input_params` | Array | Conditional | `[{paramName, paramValue}]` — use field names from biller info |
| `init_channel` | String | No | Default: AGT |
| `payment_mode` | String | No | Default: cash |

exec: if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'pk_live_YOUR_API_KEY_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_key in Collection Variables');
if (!apiSecret || apiSecret === 'sk_live_YOUR_API_SECRET_HERE') throw new Error('Set api_secret in Collection Variables');

body.raw:
{
  "retailer_id": "YOUR_RETAILER_PARTNER_ID",
  "biller_id": "AUBA00000NAT3Q",
  "biller_name": "AU Bank Credit Card",
  "consumer_number": "9876543210",
  "amount": 20000,
  "consumer_name": "John Doe",
  "due_date": "2026-03-15",
  "bill_date": "2026-02-01",
  "biller_category": "Credit Card",
  "payment_mode": "Cash",
  "reqId": "req-id-from-fetch-bill",
  "additional_info": {
    "billerResponse": {
      "billAmount": "20000",
      "billDate": "2026-02-01",
      "customerName": "John Doe",
      "dueDate": "2026-03-15"
    },
    "inputParams": [
      { "paramName": "Last 4 digits of Credit Card Number", "paramValue": "1234" },
      { "paramName": "Registered Mobile Number", "paramValue": "9876543210" }
    ],
    "additionalInfo": [],
    "category": "Credit Card"
  }
}

request.description:
Pay a bill. Debits the retailer's wallet (bill amount + service charge).

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `retailer_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Retailer's partner_id (whose wallet is debited) |
| `biller_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Biller ID |
| `biller_name` | String | ✅ Yes | Biller name |
| `consumer_number` | String | ✅ Yes | Consumer number |
| `amount` | Number | ✅ Yes | Amount in paise |
| `consumer_name` | String | No | Consumer name from bill |
| `due_date` | String | No | Bill due date |
| `bill_date` | String | No | Bill date |
| `biller_category` | String | No | Category name |
| `payment_mode` | String | No | Cash (default) |
| `reqId` | String | Recommended | reqId from Fetch Bill response |
| `additional_info` | Object | Recommended | billerResponse, inputParams, additionalInfo from Fetch Bill |
| `pan_number` | String | Conditional | Required for amount > ₹49,999 |

### Flow
1. Call **Fetch Bill** first to get `reqId`, `billerResponse`, `additionalInfo`
2. Pass those in `additional_info` when paying
3. Wallet is debited: bill amount + charge (from scheme)
4. On failure, wallet is automatically refunded

request.description:

### Request Body

|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `transaction_id` | String | ✅ Yes | BBPS transaction reference ID |
| `track_type` | String | No | `TRANS_REF_ID` (default) or `UTR` |

request.description:
Register a BBPS complaint.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `transaction_id` | String | ✅ Yes | Transaction reference ID |
| `description` | String | ✅ Yes | Complaint description |
| `complaint_type` | String | No | Transaction (default), Service |
| `complaint_disposition` | String | No | Reason |

request.description:
